concerns.text: FR-005b requires sensitivity analysis of baseline proportion across range 0.02–0.10 (step 0.01). T031 only mentions 'binomial test and Wilson CI' without explicit sensitivity analysis implementation. No task covers the baseline sweep and max variation reporting.

FR-004b requires flagging summaries when reported sample sizes differ from extracted counts by >5%. T024 mentions 'inconsistency validator' but does not explicitly cover sample-size mismatch detection. T073 covers FR-004 but not FR-004b specifically.

SC-001 requires a manually annotated validation set of ≥100 summaries for extraction accuracy measurement. No task creates, sources, or validates this manual annotation dataset. T080 verifies SC-001 but the dataset itself is not produced.

Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene) requires checksums recorded in state/projects/PROJ-492-evaluating-the-statistical-validity-of-p.yaml artifact_hashes map. T076/T077 write checksums to data/checksums.txt and output/checksums.txt instead.
Constitution Principle V (Governance) specifies Advancement-Evaluator Agent as sole writer of current_stage. No task implements this agent's validation workflow or state update mechanism.

Constitution Principle VI (Statistical Consistency Verification) requires discrepancies >0.05 be justified in an analysis notebook before results are accepted. No task creates the analysis notebook artifact.

T009 and T075 both address deterministic seeding with overlapping scope (T009 pins SEED=42, T075 ensures all modules import SEED). Redundant task coverage for the same requirement creates maintenance burden.

FR-028 requires Quickstart guide enabling 30 URLs in ≤30 minutes. T037 only creates the guide file without a task to actually verify the 30-minute execution time claim (T091 verifies SC-028 but is in Phase X, not implementation).
